title: selaginella australiensis
intro: Selaginella australiensis, also known as Australian spikemoss, is a type of ancient, vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella australiensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
